title: Vanish Oxi Action Powder Fabric Stain Remover Colour Safe - 470g
features: Removes stubborn stains in a cold wash 30°C
Prevents colour run to keep garments looking bright and at their best
Removes odours from deep within clothing fibres
Suitable for both colours and whites
description: Product Description Our best Oxi Advance formula for your colours. It's multi power removes stains, prevents colour transfer and eliminates odours whilst giving your laundry a hygiene boost in-wash*. A versatile and convenient laundry booster, just add one scoop in every wash to breathe life into your clothes! Safe on everyday fabrics like cotton and polyester, use on colours and whites. Ingredients Sodium percarbonate, Enzymes, Anionic & Non-Ionic Surfactants, Sodium Carbonate, Tetraacetylethylenediamine (TAED), Perfume, Sodium Percarbonate, Zeolites, > 30%: oxygen-based bleaching agents, <5%: anionic surfactants, non-ionic surfactants. Safety Warning Vanish oxi action colour safe powder fabric stain remover. Contains sodium carbonate peroxide, benzenesulfonic acid, c10-13-alkyl derivs., sodium salts. Causes serious eye damage. Causes skin irritation. Keep out of reach of children. Do not get in eyes, on skin, or on clothing. Wash hands thoroughly after handling. Wear eye protection. If in eyes: rinse cautiously with water for several minutes. Remove contact lenses, if present and easy to do. Continue rinsing. Immediately call a doctor. If swallowed: call a doctor if you feel unwell. For sensitive skin, the use of gloves is recommended. Do not get on clothes while wearing. See more

specifications_table.Storage Instructions: ‎Reclose lid after each use and keep vanish in a cool dry place.
